\tzpentry{ID3783}{Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3783 introduces Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_{ij} = K_0\, \frac{\exp\!\big(-|r_i-r_j|/L\big)}{|r_i-r_j|+\varepsilon}, \label{eq:kuramoto_kernel} \end{equation}
